name: Merge Zoo
author: Poki
description: Merge Zoo is a watermelon merge game with a fun animal twist! Shoot adorable animal balls from below and watch them bounce, collide, and merge into bigger creatures. Your ultimate goal is to create the biggest elephant! But be careful, if any animal crosses the top line, it’s game over! Can you merge your way to the top of the zoo? How to play Merge Zoo? Click or tap to shoot the animal ball. Who created Merge Zoo? Merge Zoo is created by Critters Studio. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Merge Zoo for free? You can play Merge Zoo for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Zoo on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Zoo can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
